The '''''Memory of Ithor''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]].

During the final segment of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the ''Memory of Ithor'' was assigned to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' fleet led by [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']]. Under the leadership of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Pash Cracken]], the ''Memory of Ithor'' took critical damage during [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|Operation Trinity]]. Cracken and most of his crew evacuated before the ship's core went critical and it detonated.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}}
